title: Block Dialogue — Core Communication
description: You just arrived in Slovakia. You meet someone for the first time. Use everything you learned.

contact.name: Marek
contact.role: Someone you just met in Slovakia

context: You just arrived in Slovakia. You bump into Marek, a friendly Slovak, and start a conversation. Use what you know.

exchanges.speaker: marek
exchanges.prompt: Marek greets you. What do you say back?
exchanges.correctFeedback: Dobrý deň! — matching the register. He greeted you formally, you respond formally.
exchanges.wrongFeedback: Dobrý deň is the right match — always mirror the greeting you receive.

exchanges.speaker: marek
exchanges.prompt: Marek asks how you are. You are doing well. What do you say?
exchanges.correctFeedback: Dobre, ďakujem. A vy? — perfect. You answered and returned the question. That's exactly how Slovaks expect this exchange to go.
exchanges.wrongFeedback: The natural response is Dobre, ďakujem — and always return the question with A vy? when speaking formally.

exchanges.speaker: marek
exchanges.text: Veľmi dobre, ďakujem. Hovoríte po slovensky?
exchanges.translation: Very well, thank you. Do you speak Slovak?
exchanges.prompt: Marek asks if you speak Slovak. You speak a little. What do you say?

choices.translation: I speak a little. I don't speak well.

exchanges.correctFeedback: Hovorím trochu. Nehovorím dobre. — honest and clear. Slovaks will immediately adjust and speak more simply for you.
exchanges.wrongFeedback: Hovorím trochu is the most accurate answer — it tells Marek to keep things simple without shutting down the conversation.

exchanges.speaker: marek
exchanges.translation: I understand. Do you need help with anything?
exchanges.prompt: Marek speaks too fast and you missed part of what he said. What do you do?
exchanges.correctFeedback: Hovorte pomaly, prosím. — exactly right. Marek will slow down and you will understand much more.
exchanges.wrongFeedback: When someone speaks too fast, Hovorte pomaly, prosím is your go-to. It's polite and always works.

exchanges.speaker: marek
exchanges.prompt: Marek slowed down and repeated. You understood this time. What do you say?
exchanges.correctFeedback: Áno, rozumiem. Ďakujem! — great. You confirmed you understood and thanked him. Natural and warm.
exchanges.wrongFeedback: You understood this time — so Áno, rozumiem. Ďakujem! is the right response.

exchanges.speaker: marek
exchanges.prompt: Marek is leaving. How do you say goodbye formally?
exchanges.correctFeedback: Dovidenia! Ďakujem! — perfect formal farewell. You closed the conversation politely and with gratitude.
exchanges.wrongFeedback: Dovidenia is the formal goodbye — always use it with people you don't know well. Čau and Ahoj are only for friends.

completionMessage: 🎉 Well done! You just had your first real conversation in Slovakia. You greeted, answered, admitted you don't speak Slovak well, asked him to slow down, and said goodbye — all in Slovak.
